productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Top
description: CompositionBlack top made of 100% viscose, has a V-neck, short raglan sleeves, ruched from the shoulders down on the sides, has a snipped edge layer from the right neckline curving under the right armhole and layered at the left hem in a cross over designWash careonly hand wash in cool waterDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanTurn inside out and dry flat in shadeWarm iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryOozing femininity, this black top from united colors of benetton is perfect for those women who never compromise on style and comfort. The viscose fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day, while the short sleeves and layered look adds a glamorous touch. Team this with denim pants or skirts and sandals for a chic look.Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
